report.summary: Audited 4 new learn pages (Hyperliquid, GPU Compute, Virtuals, Aave V4) for UX issues, fixed OG metadata on GPU Compute page, copied missing Hyperliquid OG image, and added BackToTop component to Aave V4 page.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Aave V4 guide: added missing BackToTop component import and placement at page bottom for consistent scroll-to-top behavior
GPU Compute guide: fixed OG image metadata referencing .png when only .svg exists — changed both openGraph and twitter image URLs to .svg
Hyperliquid perp-dex guide: confirmed tables use overflow-x:auto for mobile; inline structured data and breadcrumb present (functional but not using shared components)
Virtuals Protocol guide: cleanest implementation — uses Breadcrumb, BackToTop, StructuredData components, proper OG metadata, mobile overflow on tables. No changes needed.
Monad blockchain guide (recently unblocked): uses dynamic OG API route, all 3 shared components present. No changes needed.
Recommendation carry-forward: Hyperliquid and Aave V4 use inline breadcrumbs instead of shared Breadcrumb component — consider refactoring for consistency in a future cycle

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: og-hyperliquid-2026.svg (1200x630) — copied from Degen0x build to cryptodegen/public/; candlestick chart visualization with HYPE stats, DeFi/Trading badges, degen0x brand treatment

No new OG images needed to be created from scratch — GPU Compute (.svg already existed, metadata fixed), Virtuals (og-virtuals-protocol-guide.svg present), Aave V4 (og-aave-v4-guide.png/svg both present)

sections.title: Pages Audited
items: hyperliquid-perp-dex-trading-guide-2026: OG image was missing in cryptodegen (fixed), inline StructuredData + breadcrumb (functional), BackToTop present, tables mobile-friendly
decentralized-gpu-compute-guide-2026: OG metadata format mismatch .png vs .svg (fixed), StructuredData + BackToTop present, missing Breadcrumb component (uses inline nav)
virtuals-protocol-guide: fully compliant — all shared components, correct OG metadata, mobile-friendly tables
aave-v4-guide: BackToTop missing (fixed), StructuredData present, missing Breadcrumb component (uses inline nav), OG images exist
monad-blockchain-guide (bonus check): fully compliant, uses dynamic OG API

sections.title: Programmer Refinements
items: Added BackToTop import and component to aave-v4-guide/page.tsx (2 line changes)
Fixed OG image URL in decentralized-gpu-compute-guide-2026/page.tsx: .png → .svg in both openGraph.images and twitter.images
Copied og-hyperliquid-2026.svg from Degen0x/public/ to cryptodegen/public/
Carry-forward: extract shared LearnPageLayout component to reduce duplication across learn guides (flagged in previous design cycle, still relevant)

sections.title: Component Compliance Matrix
items: Breadcrumb: 2/5 pages use shared component (Virtuals, Monad); 3/5 use inline nav (Hyperliquid, GPU Compute, Aave V4)
BackToTop: 5/5 pages now have it (Aave V4 fixed this cycle)
StructuredData: 4/5 pages use shared component; Hyperliquid uses inline script tag (functionally equivalent)
Mobile table overflow: 4/4 pages with tables use overflow-x:auto correctly
OG images: 5/5 pages now have valid OG image references with existing files
